label: Class 4 Mathematics — money word problems in Bengali (haat/market)

input.prompt: Create a worksheet of money word problems (addition and subtraction with rupees) for my Class 4 students, using examples from the village haat.
input.subject: Mathematics

label: Class 3 EVS — plants around us worksheet in Bengali

input.prompt: Make a simple worksheet for Class 3 on types of plants (trees, shrubs, herbs, creepers) with matching, sorting and one drawing activity of plants children see around their homes.
input.subject: EVS

label: Class 5 Science — water cycle worksheet in Bengali (monsoon context)

input.prompt: Create a worksheet on the water cycle for Class 5 with fill-in-the-blanks, true/false and one diagram-labelling activity, connecting it to the monsoon and paddy farming.
input.subject: Science
